import json, sys, io
sys.stdout = io.TextIOWrapper\(sys.stdout.buffer, encoding='utf-8'\)
with open\('data/items.json'\) as f:
    items = json.load\(f\)
imported = {i['qid'] for i in items}
linked = set\(\)
for item in items:
    for t in item['triples']:
        if t['value']['type'] == 'wikibase-item':
            linked.add\(t['value']['value']\)
unresolved = linked - imported
print\(f'Imported QIDs: {len\(imported\)}'\)
print\(f'Linked QIDs \(wikibase-item values\): {len\(linked\)}'\)
print\(f'Already imported: {len\(linked & imported\)}'\)
print\(f'Need to fetch: {len\(unresolved\)}'\)
print\(f'First 20: {sorted\(unresolved\)[:20]}'\)
")

Bash(cd C:/Users/Immanuelle/Documents/Github/embedding-mapping && python -c "
import json, sys, io
sys.stdout = io.TextIOWrapper\(sys.stdout.buffer, encoding='utf-8'\)
with open\('data/items.json', encoding='utf-8'\) as f:
    items = json.load\(f\)
full = [i for i in items if i['triples']]
linked = [i for i in items if not i['triples']]
total_triples = sum\(len\(i['triples']\) for i in full\)
total_quals = sum\(sum\(len\(t.get\('qualifiers',[]\)\) for t in i['triples']\) for i in full\)
total_srcs = sum\(sum\(len\(t.get\('sources',[]\)\) for t in i['triples']\) for i in full\)
print\(f'Full items: {len\(full\)}'\)
print\(f'Linked-only items: {len\(linked\)}'\)
print\(f'Total triples: {total_triples}'\)
print\(f'Total qualifiers: {total_quals}'\)
print\(f'Total sources: {total_srcs}'\)
")

Bash(/c/Users/Immanuelle/AppData/Local/Programs/Python/Python313/python.exe -c "
import io, sys
sys.stdout = io.TextIOWrapper\(sys.stdout.buffer, encoding='utf-8', errors='replace'\)

from transformers import AutoTokenizer
tok = AutoTokenizer.from_pretrained\('mixedbread-ai/mxbai-embed-large-v1'\)

test_words = [
    'Jinmyocho', 'Hokkaid\\u014d', 'kugy\\u014d', 'Ky\\u014dto',
    '\\u00c9ire', 'Djaza\\u00efr', 'Rom\\u00e2nia', 'T\\u014dky\\u014d',
    'Shqip\\u00ebris\\u00eb', 'Bielaru\\u015b', 'Ukra\\u00efna',
    'Filas\\u1e6d\\u012bn', '\\u1e24arak\\u0101t',
    'mountain', 'Japan', 'flag', 'emperor', 'citizenship',
]

unk_id = tok.convert_tokens_to_ids\('[UNK]'\)
print\(f'[UNK] token ID: {unk_id}'\)
print\(\)
print\(f'{\\"Word\\":30s} {\\"Tokens\\":55s} {\\"UNKs\\":>5}'\)
print\('-' * 95\)

for word in test_words:
    tokens = tok.tokenize\(word\)
    ids = tok.convert_tokens_to_ids\(tokens\)
    unk_count = ids.count\(unk_id\)
    tok_str = str\(tokens\)
    if len\(tok_str\) > 52:
        tok_str = tok_str[:52] + '...'
    print\(f'{word:30s} {tok_str:55s} {unk_count:>5}'\)
" 2>&1)

import json, sys, io
sys.stdout = io.TextIOWrapper\(sys.stdout.buffer, encoding='utf-8'\)

with open\('C:/Users/Immanuelle/Documents/Github/embedding-mapping/papers/economics/paper.md', 'r', encoding='utf-8'\) as f:
    content = f.read\(\)
with open\('C:/Users/Immanuelle/Documents/Github/embedding-mapping/papers/economics/SKILL.md', 'r', encoding='utf-8'\) as f:
    skill = f.read\(\)

lines = content.split\('\\n'\)
title = lines[0].lstrip\('# '\).strip\(\)
abstract_start = content.find\('## Abstract'\)
intro_start = content.find\('## 1.'\)
abstract = content[abstract_start + len\('## Abstract'\):intro_start].strip\(\)
author_end = content.find\('\\n## Abstract'\)
body = content[author_end:].strip\(\)

payload = {
    'title': title,
    'abstract': abstract,
    'content': body,
    'tags': ['economics', 'financial-bubbles', 'ai-investment', 'market-structure', 'structural-comparison'],
    'human_names': ['Emma Leonhart'],
    'skill_md': skill,
    'supersedes': 354
}

with open\('C:/Users/Immanuelle/Documents/Github/embedding-mapping/papers/economics/submission_payload.json', 'w', encoding='utf-8'\) as f:
    json.dump\(payload, f, ensure_ascii=False\)
print\('Payload ready'\)
")
